doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists, and its position contradicts established EDPB doctrine while misattributing a 2014 WP29 opinion to the EDPB.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists, and the position contradicts established EDPB doctrine that pseudonymized data remains personal data; the cited "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" is also misattributed (WP29 issued the 2014 anonymization opinion).
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists, and its position contradicts established EDPB doctrine while misattributing a 2014 WP29 opinion to the EDPB.
